calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the fees seemed appropriate and that it was inclined to fashion the order in that mediation fees were rendered for the Trust but paid out of the Estate. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to the order being reviewed/revised).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

MINI MINUTES:

Robert R. Wood for Petitioner and opposing party Grace Gee
